summary: Comprehensive testing of Nucleus personal productivity app - all 4 phases complete with AI integration working perfectly. Backend APIs 100% functional, frontend pages loading correctly with proper authentication and UI interactions.

design_issues.issue: BQ Practice background is rgb(28, 25, 23) which is appropriate dark theme, but validation logic was unclear

passed_tests: Authentication - Test user login working
All 50 backend API endpoints (100% success rate)
Link Vault CRUD operations with categories
Calorie Tracker with AI estimation (320 calories estimated)
Vocabulary Bank with AI definition generation
Ideas Notepad with AI expansion (4796 characters generated)
BQ Practice with AI feedback (7368 characters of detailed feedback)
Global Search functionality (Cmd+K shortcut working)
Weekly Review AI generation (1419 characters summary)
Export endpoints (daily note & full data export)
All frontend pages loading correctly
Dashboard with proper authentication
Link Vault page with create link functionality
Calorie Tracker page with meal logging
Vocabulary page with word addition and AI generation
Ideas page with kanban board view
BQ Practice page with dark theme
Settings page with export options
Global search modal (Cmd+K) functionality
Create forms working (Link, Meal, Word, Idea)
Navigation between all modules working
Session-based authentication working properly

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (23/24 tests passed - minor typo in one test script)
success_percentage.ai_integration: 100% (all AI features working: calorie estimation, vocabulary definition, idea expansion, BQ feedback, weekly review)
